info.english_meaning: to pitty to do favor to go
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: 1.876 krap ityasya ayaM pAWaBedaH sidDAntakOmudyAM na vartate parantu DAtupradIpe 'kfpa ityeke paWanti' iti nirdeSena jYApitaH dfSyate
